test.name: Compare HTML Table With Parquet Data

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Read Html Table
kw.msg: C:\PycharmProjects\dqe_automation-new\robot_framework_project\helper.py:26: UserWarning: Parsing dates in %Y-%m-%d format when dayfirst=True was specified. Pass `dayfirst=False` or specify a format to silence this warning. df['Visit Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Visit Date'], dayfirst=True)
${html_df} = Facility Type Visit Date Average Time Spent 0 Hospital 2026-04-18 49.50 1 Clinic 2026-04-18 41.50 2 Hospital 2026-04-18 ...

kw.name: Read Parquet Data
kw.msg: ${parquet_df} = Facility Type Visit Date Average Time Spent 25346 Clinic 2026-04-09 57.00 25347 Hospital 2026-04-07 43.33 25348 Clinic 2026-04-08 ...

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Fail
kw.msg: Data mismatch found: Row count mismatch: HTML=21, Parquet=51
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
kw.status: Data mismatch found: Row count mismatch: HTML=21, Parquet=51

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
kw.status: Data mismatch found: Row count mismatch: HTML=21, Parquet=51

test.status: Data mismatch found: Row count mismatch: HTML=21, Parquet=51
